children.text: Check your connection and try again.
Shipping charge of approximately USD 16.67 may be applicable.
Current customization will delay the delivery by x days
Check your connection and try again.
We deliver orders to all pincodes across India via Fedex, Bluedart, DTDC & SpeedPost (remote areas).
8 Business days. Orders from remote locations might be slightly delayed.
FREE shipping on all orders across all locations in India.
Free shipping applicable subject to campaigns/offers and Order total.
10-12 business days basis destination country. If ‘Custom Stitching’ is selected, we need 5-8 days extra.
USD 16.67 - First 500 grams and USD 6.67 - Every additional 500 grams. Total shipping charges basis the weight of items in your order will be reflected on ‘checkout’ page.
